analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet states that the UN Security Council has not acted to reinstate sanctions on Iran and urges the US to stop claiming to speak on behalf of the Council, implying US overreach or misrepresentation. Evaluation per narrative: RU1 (West immoral/hostile): The tweet implicitly criticizes the US for falsely speaking on behalf of the Security Council and lacking courage to face the truth, portraying the US negatively as overreaching or deceptive. This aligns with depicting the West/US as hostile or improper. RU2 (Russia leads alternative system): No mention of Russia promoting a multipolar/alternative system or non-Western cooperation; focus is on UNSC procedure and US behavior. RU3 (Russia benevolent partner): No self-portrayal of Russia aiding peace or development. RU4 (Russian history admirable): Not applicable. RU5 (Russia at forefront): Not applicable. RU6 (Russia culture/nature): Not applicable. Conclusion: The tweet promotes RU1.
